title: rosa agrestis subsp. graveolens
intro: Rosa agrestis subsp. graveolens, also known as Wild Rose or Prickly Rose, is a subspecies of wild rose that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been shown to have antimicrobial and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Rosa agrestis subsp. graveolens include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin health, as well as its possible use in treating digestive issues and other minor ailments. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine and natural health practices.
